agent_analysis.hypothesis_rationale: Nonprofits receiving larger total contributions scale up and locate headquarters in ZIP codes with higher log real estate values (ZHVI).
agent_analysis.prior_art_notes: Bielefeld (2000) shows headquarters selection correlates with regional socioeconomic capital indicators.
agent_analysis.interpretation: A statistically significant but practically negligible positive correlation was found. Nonprofits with larger contributions are slightly associated with higher log real estate values, but the effect is practically zero.
